author: gb9t
content: Iter 51 result: virt/kvm/x86-mmu-shadow.md (legacy shadow MMU - mmu.c ~8104 lines + paging_tmpl.h per-mode walker + spte.c bit layout + page_track.c external-client write notify; per-vCPU shadow context + per-SP rmap + mmu_valid_gen invalidation + KVMGT integration) + drivers/iommu/intel-irq-remap.md (Intel IR - irq_remapping.c ~1605 lines; per-IOMMU IRT 64K entries + per-IRTE 128-bit atomic-update + source-id validation + posted-IRQ PDA mode for KVM SR-IOV bypass + x2APIC gate). 52 Tier-3s drafted total. Next iter plan: drivers/iommu/intel-prq.md (PRI Request Queue for SVA/SVM page-faults) + virt/kvm/x86-svm.md or x86-vmx.md (per-vendor VM op-table + vmenter/vmexit handlers).
